trumpRule: Per CODEX S52.43 §7 + S52.37: the canvas is the spec. Marketable-status + severance read in 3 seconds before any prose. CAS Color Protocol on every status element. NOT an insured-title product — 'general info, not certified for closing' disclaimer always visible.

canvasTabs.label: Ownership chain
canvasTabs.description: Default tab. CAS instrument panel + parcel map (subject parcel + easements drawn) + optional user-upload drone aerial (video-tile/v1, unverified badge) + 3 verdict hero cards (Title chain clean/issues · Open encumbrances · Rights severance) + vertical chain-of-title newest-first (CAS-coded transfer cards: grantor→grantee, deed type, date, consideration, recording no., status) + right-rail heroes (Marketable status Yes/No · Open encumbrances · Last sale price · Lien total) + CAS flag stack. Plat map folds in here.

canvasTabs.label: Encumbrances
canvasTabs.description: 3 verdict hero cards (Lien stack clear/total · Open easements · Deed restrictions) + CAS-coded encumbrance detail cards (type, recording, amount, status, action link) + lien-stack-as-bars visualization (mortgage / mechanic / tax / HOA / judgment / IRS — zero-height green bars = clear at a glance).

canvasTabs.label: Recorded docs
canvasTabs.description: Recorded-instrument archive table (type, grantor→grantee, recording no., date, consideration, CAS-coded status: Verified / Verify probate / Review impact / Minerals severed, Pull-doc link per row) + filter chips (All / Deeds / Easements / Liens / Other) + search + dark stats header (total instruments / deeds / easements / liens). Tax + judgment search status surfaces here. Every instrument retrieved from county recorder (EH-01) — no recall.

canvasTabs.label: Rights stack
canvasTabs.description: THE DIFFERENTIATOR. Vertical column above-land→below-land: Air · Radio/spectrum · Surface · Water · Carbon · Mineral · Oil&gas · Digital. STRATUM BANDS earth-tone by elevation (above=light-blue / surface=light-green / below=tan); CAS color ONLY on per-stratum status badge (Held/Verified=green · Severed=red · Review=yellow · Action=blue · status=white). e.g. mineral = tan band + RED 'SEVERED 1978' badge. Right rail: jurisdiction land-law context + action items + rights-stack summary.

canvasTabs.label: Plain English
canvasTabs.description: CAS-coded conversational prose. GREEN verdict hero (e.g. 'This title is clean. The chain goes back to 1978 with no gaps.') + CAS-coded sections (who-owns-it / what's-attached / what's-owed / what's-below-the-surface) + common-questions Q&A + action bar (Pull easement docs, Pull probate order, Check mineral records, Export PDF).
